name: Homage: Godless Grotto
short_description: Venture into the unforgiving caverns under the mountain on an impossible quest in this high-fantasy split screen roleplaying game.
detailed_description:
Rejoice felonious Goblins, you have been granted the divine mercy of the gods! Gather arms and armor, you will trek forth to the den of the witch! The path you travel will be difficult, know that you may not return, but it is in service of the gods that you die. Should you succeed in your task, your people will again be graced to look upon the sunlit fields of Gracoa!

Key features:

  • Split screen for 1-9 players

  • Permadeath hardcore gameplay

  • Goblid customization

  • Train your skills to become capable warriors

  • Battle dangerous enemies in a survival scenario

  • Utilize weapons and armor in combat

  • Chug potions to enhance yourself or deal damage
